exploration_notes: Implemented three changes across two files to prevent IDN phishing attacks: (1) Added getHostnameWithRegex function to url.ts that extracts the core hostname from a URL using regex pattern analysis, (2) Restructured useLinkHandler to apply punycode conversion to external links before processing them (moving the conversion earlier in the flow, before the confirmation modal check), (3) Added proper error handling with return statement when URL cannot be extracted from a link, and try-catch with er
